en.sidebar_about_body:
**Spazi Shops helps you:**

1. **Decide** what to restock, what to reprice, and what new product to try.
2. **Plan** which day to be at which supplier (Sasko, Coca-Cola depot, the Simba rep, Jumbo Cash & Carry).
3. **Track** daily profit per product so you know exactly which lines pay the rent.
4. **Browse** the catalogue and add new products to your stock with one click.
en.sidebar_caption: Built for the IEB TechWays AI Hackathon 2026.
en.advice_subhead: Tell Spazi Shops what's on your shelves and what sold last week
en.advice_stock_caption: What's on your shelves right now.
en.advice_sales_caption: How many of each you sold in the past 7 days.
en.advice_style_help: **Worded** — three short sections you can read like a brief. **Quick actions** — a table of one-line bumps (⬆️ Increase / ⬇️ Decrease / ⏸️ Hold), the specific amount, and a reason.
en.advice_no_actions: No actions — add stock and sales data and click _Get advice_.
en.schedule_mode_help: Auto = use the supplier's best day · Manual = pick your own date · Skip = drop from totals
en.schedule_date_help: When you're actually going to buy this. Manual edits switch the schedule to Manual.
en.profit_subhead: Profit Tracker — what your shop is actually earning
en.profit_units_by_day_hint: Hover to see each product's contribution per day.
en.profit_chart_caption: Green = profit per day · Yellow = cumulative.
en.profit_no_chart: Add some sales below to see your profit line.
en.profit_sales_log_caption: One row per product per day. Edit unit price/cost to see profit update.
en.profit_purchase_log_caption: Every stock-in event — track what you paid and to whom.
en.delivery_subhead: Delivery & Purchasing — what to buy, where, and when
en.delivery_banner: 📅 This week's plan below combines your live stock / sales numbers with realistic supplier patterns for Gauteng townships. Each line auto-schedules to the supplier's best day — switch to Manual to pick your own date or Skip to drop it. The grand total includes stock outlay plus transport (R0 for direct delivery, ~R80 per Jumbo Cash & Carry trip).
en.delivery_nothing_urgent: ✅ Nothing urgent to source this week — stock levels are matching demand.
en.delivery_section_trips_caption: Grouped by the day you'll be at each supplier — fewer trips, less transport cost. Skipped lines are excluded.
en.delivery_all_skipped: Every line is set to Skip — no trips this week.
en.delivery_grand_total_html: Grand total this week: R{total:,.2f}  ·  stock R{stock:,.2f}  +  transport R{transport:,.2f}
en.browse_subhead: Browse Products — pick something to add to your stock
en.browse_banner: 🛍️ The catalogue covers {count} products across {cats} categories, each with cost price, township median price, margin, supplier, and best purchase day. Click Add to my stock on any card and the product appears on the Get Advice tab.
en.advice_report_problem: 🚩 Report a problem with this advice
en.help_subhead: Help & Reports — open a ticket, we'll triage
en.help_intro: Report a problem, request a feature, or open a support ticket. Tickets are tracked here in your session — download the CSV to keep a record.
en.help_no_tickets: No tickets yet — submit one above to start the conversation.
en.footer: Spazi Shops · Built for the IEB TechWays AI Hackathon 2026 · Team Grade 10
en.profit_current_stock_sales_caption: Edit here or on the Get Advice tab — both views share the same data.
en.auth_have_account: Already have an account? Sign in
en.auth_failed: That username or password doesn't match.
en.footer_ai_disclaimer: ⚠️ AI can make mistakes — always verify before acting on advice.
en.footer_terms_body:
**Last updated: 2026-05-20**

By using spazi shops you agree to the following terms.

**1. Demo / Hackathon Build**  
This is a prototype built for the IEB TechWays AI Hackathon 2026. It is not a production product. Features may change, data may be lost on restart, and downtime can happen without notice.

**2. AI-Generated Recommendations**  
The advice, prices, schedules and trip plans shown here are produced by deterministic algorithms running on your device, using anonymised benchmark data for South African townships. They are starting points — not professional financial, accounting, or commercial advice. Always verify prices, suppliers, and quantities against your own records and local conditions before acting.

**3. No Warranty**  
spazi shops is provided *as is*, without warranty of any kind. We make no guarantees about accuracy, availability, fitness for a particular purpose, or financial outcomes.

**4. No Liability**  
We are not liable for any direct or indirect loss arising from your use of this app, including business decisions made on the basis of any output.

**5. Data & Privacy**  
Everything you enter — stock, sales, purchases, tickets, account credentials — is stored only in your browser session. Nothing is sent to a server, no analytics, no tracking, no cookies beyond what Streamlit requires to render the page. Closing the tab erases the session.

**6. Intellectual Property**  
Brand names, logos, and trademarks referenced in the catalogue (Coca-Cola, Niknaks, Simba, Sasko, Jumbo Cash & Carry, etc.) belong to their respective owners and are referenced here for product-identification purposes only. The spazi shops codebase itself is released as open source via GitHub.

**7. Acceptable Use**  
Don't try to extract or redistribute the recommender's logic for resale. Don't impersonate other users in the ticket system. Don't submit content that is illegal, harassing, or harmful.

**8. Changes**  
We may update these terms at any time. Continued use after a change constitutes acceptance.

**9. Contact**  
Open a ticket on the Help & Reports tab.
en.tos_body:
These tools provide AI-assisted suggestions based on the inputs you enter. The recommender is rule-based, runs locally, and **does not constitute financial, legal, or tax advice**. spazi shops makes no warranty regarding the accuracy of pricing benchmarks, supplier patterns, or recommendations — verify against your local market before acting.

**Data**: tickets, sales logs, purchase logs and ledger entries are session-scoped and reset when you sign out or refresh. Use the CSV exports to keep your own records.

**Support**: emailing a ticket opens your own mail client — the message is sent under your email identity, not ours.

By using this app you agree that spazi shops, its maintainers, and the IEB TechWays AI Hackathon organisers are not liable for any business outcome resulting from use of the app.
en.help_email_all_btn: 📧 Email all my tickets to support

zu.sidebar_about_body:
**i-Spazi ikusiza ngokuthi:**

1. **Nquma** ukuthi yini ozoyithenga futhi, yini ozoyishintsha inani, futhi yimuphi umkhiqizo omusha ongawuzama.
2. **Hlela** ukuthi usuku luphi ozoba kuwo umthumeli (uSasko, idiphothi yeCoca-Cola, ummeleli weSimba, iJumbo Cash & Carry).
3. **Landela** inzuzo yansuku zonke ngomkhiqizo ngamunye ukuze wazi kahle ukuthi yimuphi umkhiqizo okhokha irenti.
4. **Buka** ikhathalogu futhi wengeze imikhiqizo emisha esitokweni sakho ngokuchofoza okukodwa.
zu.sidebar_caption: Yakhelwe i-IEB TechWays AI Hackathon ka-2026.
zu.advice_subhead: Tshela i-Spazi ukuthi yini esemashelofini akho nokuthi yini edayisiwe ngeviki edlule
zu.advice_sales_caption: Mangaki kwawo wonke owadayisile ezinsukwini eziyi-7 ezedlule.
zu.advice_style_help: **Ngamagama** — izigaba ezintathu ezifushane ongazifunda njengoluhlaka. **Izenzo ezisheshayo** — itafula lokushintsha okumi ngomugqa owodwa (⬆️ Khulisa / ⬇️ Nciphisa / ⏸️ Bamba), inani eliqondile, kanye nesizathu.
zu.advice_no_actions: Azikho izenzo — engeza idatha yesitokwe nokudayisa bese uchofoza _Thola iseluleko_.
zu.schedule_mode_help: Okuzenzakalelayo = sebenzisa usuku oluhle lomthumeli · Ngesandla = khetha usuku lwakho · Yeqa = susa kusamba
zu.schedule_date_help: Ngempela uzokuthenga nini lokhu. Ukushintshwa ngesandla kushintsha uhlelo lube ngeSandla.
zu.profit_subhead: Isilandeli Senzuzo — yini isitolo sakho esiyizuzayo ngempela
zu.profit_units_by_day_hint: Beka phezulu ukubona ukufaka kwawo wonke umkhiqizo ngosuku.
zu.profit_chart_caption: Oluhlaza = inzuzo ngosuku · Liphuzi = isamba esiqoqekayo.
zu.profit_no_chart: Engeza okudayisiwe ngezansi ukuze ubone umugqa wakho wenzuzo.
zu.profit_sales_log_caption: Umugqa owodwa ngomkhiqizo ngamunye ngosuku. Hlela inani / izindleko ukubona inzuzo ishintsha.
zu.profit_purchase_log_caption: Konke ukungena kwesitokwe — landela ukuthi ukhokhe malini nakubani.
zu.delivery_subhead: Ukuhanjiswa Nokuthenga — yini ozoyithenga, kuphi, nokuthi nini
zu.delivery_banner: 📅 Uhlelo lwale viki oluseduze luhlanganisa amanani akho asebenzayo esitokwe / ukudayisa namaphethini omthumeli wamatauni aseGauteng. Umugqa ngamunye uhlela ngokuzenzakalelayo osukwini oluhle lomthumeli — shintshela ku-Ngesandla ukuze ukhethe usuku lwakho noma Yeqa ukulisusa. Isamba esikhulu sihlanganisa izindleko zesitokwe kuhlanganise nokuthuthwa (R0 ngokuhanjiswa okuqondile, ~R80 ngohambo lwe-Jumbo Cash & Carry).
zu.delivery_nothing_urgent: ✅ Akukho okuphuthumayo okudingekayo kuleli viki — amazinga esitokwe ahambisana nesidingo.
zu.delivery_section_trips_caption: Kuhlangene ngosuku oyobe ukulo kumthumeli ngamunye — uhambo oluncane, izindleko ezincane zokuthutha. Imigqa eyeqiwe ayifakiwe.
zu.delivery_all_skipped: Yonke imigqa isethelwe ku-Yeqa — akukho hambo kuleli viki.
zu.delivery_grand_total_html: Isamba esikhulu sale viki: R{total:,.2f}  ·  isitokwe R{stock:,.2f}  +  ukuthutha R{transport:,.2f}
zu.browse_subhead: Buka Imikhiqizo — khetha okuthile okuzokwengezwa esitokweni sakho
zu.browse_banner: 🛍️ Ikhathalogu ifaka {count} imikhiqizo kuzigaba ezingu-{cats}, ngakunye nenani lezindleko, inani eliphakathi laselokishini, imejini, umthumeli, kanye nosuku oluhle lokuthenga. Chofoza Engeza esitokweni sami kunoma yiliphi ikhadi futhi umkhiqizo uzovela kuthebhu ye-Thola Iseluleko.
zu.help_intro: Bika inkinga, cela isici, noma vula ithikithi lokwesekwa. Amathikithi alandelelwa lapha esikhathini sakho — landa i-CSV ukuze ugcine irekhodi.
zu.help_no_tickets: Awekho amathikithi okwamanje — hambisa elinye ngenhla ukuze uqale ingxoxo.
zu.footer: Spazi Shops · Yakhelwe i-IEB TechWays AI Hackathon ka-2026 · iThimba leBanga le-10
zu.profit_current_stock_sales_caption: Hlela lapha noma kuthebhu ye-Thola Iseluleko — kokubili kuhambisana nedatha efanayo.
zu.footer_ai_disclaimer: ⚠️ I-AI ingenza amaphutha — hlola njalo ngaphambi kokuthatha isinyathelo.
zu.tos_body:
Lawa mathuluzi ahlinzeka ngezeluleko ezilekelelwa yi-AI ezisuselwa kulokho okufakayo. Isiluleko sisuselwa emithethweni, siyasebenza ngaphandle kwe-inthanethi, **futhi ayisiseluleko sezimali, sezomthetho, noma sentela**. I-spazi shops ayinasiqinisekiso ngokunemba kwamanani — qinisekisa endaweni yakho ngaphambi kokuthatha isinyathelo.

**Idatha**: amathikithi nemibhalo ihlala esikhathini sokufinyelela, kususwa lapho uphuma noma uvuselela ikhasi. Sebenzisa i-CSV ukuze ugcine amarekhodi akho.

**Usizo**: ukuthumela ithikithi nge-imeyili kuvula i-imeyili yakho — umyalezo uthunyelwa egameni lakho hhayi elethu.

Ngokusebenzisa lolu hlelo lokusebenza uyavuma ukuthi i-spazi shops nabasunguli abasolisi ngalokho okwenzeka ebhizinisini okususelwa ekusebenziseni kwakho lolu hlelo.
zu.footer_terms_body:
**Kubuyekezwe kokugcina: 2026-05-20**

Ngokusebenzisa i-spazi shops uyavuma le mibandela elandelayo.

**1. Idemo / I-Hackathon Build**  
Lokhu kuprototype eyakhelwe i-IEB TechWays AI Hackathon 2026. Akuwona umkhiqizo wokuthengiswa.

**2. Iziphakamiso ezenziwe yi-AI**  
Iseluleko, amanani, izinhlelo nezinhlelo zohambo eziboniswa lapha kukhiqizwa ama-algorithms ahlala kudivayisi yakho. Lokhu kuyizindawo zokuqala — akuyona iseluleko sezimali noma lezamabhizinisi. Hlola amanani, abathengisi, namanani ngokwakho ngaphambi kokwenza isinyathelo.

**3. Akukho Siqinisekiso**  
I-spazi shops inikezwa *njengoba injalo*, ngaphandle kwesiqinisekiso.

**4. Akukho Sibhekiseli**  
Asibhekiseli kunoma yikuphi ukulahleka okuqondile noma okungaqondile okuvela ekusebenziseni kwakho lolu hlelo lokusebenza.

**5. Idatha Nobumfihlo**  
Konke okufakayo kugcinwa kuphela esikhathini sebrawuza yakho. Akukho okuthunyelwayo kuseva, akukho ukulandelelwa.

**6. Impahla Yobuhlakani**  
Amabhrendi noma izimpawu zokuhweba okukhulunywe ngazo ekhathalogu (Coca-Cola, Niknaks, Sasko, njll.) zezabanikazi bazo.

**7. Ukusetshenziswa Okufanele**  
Ungazami ukukhipha noma ukusabalalisa imithetho yesiluleko ukuze uthengise. Ungafaki okuthile okungekho emthethweni noma okulimazayo.

**8. Izinguquko**  
Singabuyekeza le mibandela noma kunini. Ukuqhubeka usebenzisa ngemva kokushintshwa kuyavumelana.

**9. Xhumana**  
Vula ithikithi kuthebhu ye-Usizo Nemibiko.

xh.sidebar_about_body:
**i-Spazi ikunceda ngokuthi:**

1. **Yenza isigqibo** soko unokukuthenga kwakhona, yintoni emawuyitshintshe ngexabiso, neyiphi imveliso entsha onokuyizama.
2. **Cwangcisa** ukuba usuku luphi onokuba kwababoneleli (Sasko, idepho yeCoca-Cola, ummeli weSimba, Jumbo Cash & Carry).
3. **Landela** inzuzo yemihla ngemihla ngemveliso nganye ukuze wazi yiyiphi imigca ehlawula irenti.
4. **Khangela** ikhathalogu wongeze iimveliso ezintsha kwisitokhwe sakho ngokucofa kanye.
xh.sidebar_caption: Yenzelwe i-IEB TechWays AI Hackathon ka-2026.
xh.advice_subhead: Xelela i-Spazi ukuba yintoni esezishelfwini zakho nokuba yintoni ethengisiweyo kwiveki ephelileyo
xh.advice_sales_caption: Zingaphi kwizinto ngazinye ozithengisileyo kwiintsuku ezi-7 ezidlulileyo.
xh.advice_style_help: **Ngamagama** — amacandelo amathathu amafutshane onokuwafunda njengengxelo emfutshane. **Izenzo ezikhawulezayo** — itheyibhile yokutshintsha okumi ngomgca omnye (⬆️ Yandisa / ⬇️ Cuthisa / ⏸️ Bambelela), inani elichanekileyo, kunye nesizathu.
xh.advice_no_actions: Akukho zenzo — yongeza idatha yesitokhwe nokuthengisa uze ucofe _Fumana isiluleko_.
xh.schedule_mode_help: Okuzenzekelayo = sebenzisa usuku olungcono lomboneleli · Ngesandla = khetha usuku lwakho · Tsiba = susa kwisamba
xh.schedule_date_help: Ngokwenene uzakuthenga nini oku. Ulungiso ngesandla lutshintsha inkqubo ibe nguNgesandla.
xh.profit_subhead: Umtshini wenzuzo — yintoni ngokwenene ivenkile yakho ezuzayo
xh.profit_chart_caption: Eluhlaza = inzuzo ngemini · Lityheli = iyonke ehlanganisiweyo.
xh.profit_no_chart: Yongeza ukuthengisa apha ngezantsi ukuze ubone umgca wakho wenzuzo.
xh.profit_sales_log_caption: Umgca omnye ngemveliso nganye ngemini. Hlela ixabiso / indleko yeyunithi ukuze ubone inzuzo itshintsha.
xh.profit_purchase_log_caption: Konke ukungena kwesitokhwe — landela ukuba uhlawule malini nakubani.
xh.delivery_subhead: Ukuhanjiswa neNkqubo yokuthenga — yintoni ozakuyithenga, phi, nanini
xh.delivery_banner: 📅 Isicwangciso sale veki apha ngezantsi sidibanisa amanani akho asebenzayo esitokhwe / ukuthengisa kunye namaphethini wababoneleli wamabhulorho aseGauteng. Umgca ngamnye ucwangcisa ngokwenzekelayo kusuku olungcono lomboneleli — tshintshela ku-Ngesandla ukukhetha usuku lwakho okanye Tsiba ukuze ulisuse. Isamba esikhulu sidibanisa iindleko zesitokhwe kuquka nezothutho (R0 ngokuhanjiswa ngqo, ~R80 ngohambo lwe-Jumbo Cash & Carry).
xh.delivery_nothing_urgent: ✅ Akukho nto ingxamileyo yokufumana kule veki — amazinga esitokhwe ahambelana nesidima.
xh.delivery_section_trips_caption: Kudityaniswe ngosuku oyakuba kulo kumboneleli ngamnye — uhambo oluncinci, indleko ephantsi yothutho. Imigca etsitsiweyo iyashiywa.
xh.delivery_all_skipped: Wonke umgca usethwe ku-Tsiba — akukho hambo kule veki.
xh.delivery_grand_total_html: Isamba sokuhamba kwale veki: R{total:,.2f}  ·  isitokhwe R{stock:,.2f}  +  ezothutho R{transport:,.2f}

xh.browse_banner: 🛍️ Ikhathalogu ibandakanya {count} iimveliso kwiindidi ezingama-{cats}, ngalunye nexabiso leendleko, ixabiso eliphakathi lasebhulorho, umda, umboneleli, kunye nosuku olungcono lokuthenga. Cofa Yongeza kwisitokhwe sam kwiyiphi na ikhadi yaye imveliso iya kuvela kuthebhu ye-Fumana iSiluleko.
xh.help_intro: Xela ingxaki, cela inkqubo, okanye vula itikiti lenkxaso. Amatikiti alandelwa apha kwiseshini yakho — khuphela i-CSV ukugcina irekhodi.
xh.help_no_tickets: Akukho matikiti okwangoku — ngenisa elinye apha ngentla ukuze uqalise incoko.
xh.footer: Spazi Shops · Yenzelwe i-IEB TechWays AI Hackathon ka-2026 · Iqela leBanga le-10
xh.profit_current_stock_sales_caption: Hlela apha okanye kwithebhu ye-Fumana iSiluleko — zombini iindlela zabelana ngedatha enye.
xh.footer_ai_disclaimer: ⚠️ I-AI ingenza iimpazamo — hlola njalo ngaphambi kokuthi uthathe inyathelo.
xh.tos_body:
Ezi zixhobo zinikeza iicebiso ezincediswa yi-AI ezisekelwe kuoko okungenisayo. Umcebisi usekelwe kwimithetho, usebenza ngaphandle kwentanethi, kwaye **ayisiyiyo icebiso lezezimali, lomthetho okanye lerhafu**. i-spazi shops ayiqinisekisi ukuchaneka kwamaxabiso — qinisekisa kwindawo yakho ngaphambi kokwenza isenzo.

**Idatha**: amatikiti nemibhalo ihleli kwiseshini, ihlanjululwa xa uphuma okanye uvuselela. Sebenzisa ukukhuphela i-CSV ukugcina iirekhodi zakho.

**Inkxaso**: ukuthumela itikiti nge-imeyile kuvula i-imeyile yakho — umyalezo uthunyelwa egameni lakho.

Ngokusebenzisa olu hlelo lokusebenza uyavuma ukuba i-spazi shops nabaqulunqi abasolisi ngeziphumo zoshishino ezivela kuhuhlobo lokusebenzisa olu hlelo.
xh.footer_terms_body:
**Ihlaziywe okokugqibela: 2026-05-20**

Ngokusebenzisa i-spazi shops uyavuma le mimiselo ilandelayo.

**1. Idemo / I-Hackathon Build**  
Lo ngumzekelo wokuqala owenzelwe i-IEB TechWays AI Hackathon 2026. Asisiyiyo imveliso yokuthengisa.

**2. Iicebiso ezivelisiweyo yi-AI**  
Iicebiso, amaxabiso, iicwangciso neenkqubo zohambo ezivela apha ziveliswe yi-algorithms ehlala kwidivayisi yakho. Zibalulekile njengeendawo zokuqala — azisiyiyo icebiso lezezimali okanye loshishino. Qinisekisa amaxabiso, ababoneleli, kunye namanani ngokwakho ngaphambi kokwenza isenzo.

**3. Akukho Siqinisekiso**  
i-spazi shops inikezwa *njengoko injalo*, ngaphandle kwesiqinisekiso.

**4. Akukho Buxanduva**  
Asinabuxanduva nakuyiphi nayiphi ilahleko evela ekusebenziseni kwakho.

**5. Idatha Nobumfihlo**  
Konke okungenisayo kugcinwa kuphela kwiseshini yakho yebrawuza. Akukho okuthunyelwayo kwiseva, akukho ukulandelelwa.

**6. Iimpahla Zomzimba**  
Amagama eebhrendi okanye iimpawu zokuthengisa ezinikezelwe kwikhathalogu (Coca-Cola, Niknaks, Sasko, njlnjl.) zezabanini bazo.

**7. Ukusebenzisa Okuvumelekileyo**  
Musa ukuzama ukukhupha okanye ukusabalalisa ulwazi lwecebiso. Musa ukufaka okungekho mthethweni okanye okuyingozi.

**8. Iinguqulelo**  
Singahlaziya le mimiselo nangaliphi na ixesha.

**9. Qhagamshelana**  
Vula itikiti kwiThebhu ye-Uncedo Neengxelo.

af.sidebar_about_body:
**Spazi Shops help jou:**

1. **Besluit** wat om terug op die rakke te sit, wat om te herprys, en watter nuwe produk om te probeer.
2. **Beplan** watter dag jy by watter verskaffer moet wees (Sasko, Coca-Cola-depot, die Simba-verteenwoordiger, Jumbo Cash & Carry).
3. **Volg** daaglikse wins per produk sodat jy presies weet watter lyne die huur betaal.
4. **Blaai** deur die katalogus en voeg nuwe produkte by jou voorraad met een klik.
af.sidebar_caption: Gebou vir die IEB TechWays AI Hackathon 2026.
af.advice_subhead: Vertel Spazi Shops wat op jou rakke is en wat verlede week verkoop het

af.schedule_date_help: Wanneer jy dit werklik gaan koop. Handmatige veranderinge skakel die skedule oor na Handmatig.

af.profit_units_by_day_hint: Beweeg oor om elke produk se bydrae per dag te sien.

af.profit_no_chart: Voeg verkope hieronder by om jou winslyn te sien.

af.delivery_subhead: Aflewering & Aankope — wat om te koop, waar, en wanneer
af.delivery_banner: 📅 Hierdie week se plan hieronder kombineer jou lewendige voorraad / verkoopsyfers met realistiese verskafferspatrone vir Gauteng-townships. Elke reël skeduleer outomaties na die verskaffer se beste dag — skakel oor na Handmatig om jou eie datum te kies of Slaan oor om dit weg te neem. Die groot totaal sluit voorraadkoste plus vervoer in (R0 vir direkte aflewering, ~R80 per Jumbo Cash & Carry-rit).
af.delivery_nothing_urgent: ✅ Niks dringend om hierdie week te bekom nie — voorraadvlakke pas die vraag.
af.delivery_section_trips_caption: Gegroepeer volgens die dag waarop jy by elke verskaffer sal wees — minder ritte, minder vervoerkoste. Oorgeslaande reëls is uitgesluit.
af.delivery_all_skipped: Elke reël is op Slaan oor — geen ritte hierdie week nie.
af.delivery_grand_total_html: Groot totaal vir hierdie week: R{total:,.2f}  ·  voorraad R{stock:,.2f}  +  vervoer R{transport:,.2f}
af.browse_subhead: Blaai Produkte — kies iets om by jou voorraad by te voeg
af.browse_banner: 🛍️ Die katalogus dek {count} produkte oor {cats} kategorieë, elk met kosprys, township-mediaanprys, marge, verskaffer, en beste koopdag. Klik Voeg by my voorraad op enige kaart en die produk verskyn op die Kry Advies-oortjie.
af.browse_count_clear_hint: Maak filters skoon om alles te sien.
af.browse_no_match: Geen produkte stem ooreen met jou filters nie.
af.help_subhead: Hulp & Verslae — open 'n kaartjie, ons sal sorteer
af.help_intro: Rapporteer 'n probleem, vra 'n nuwe kenmerk aan, of open 'n ondersteuningskaartjie. Kaartjies word hier in jou sessie bygehou — laai die CSV af om 'n rekord te hou.
af.help_no_tickets: Nog geen kaartjies nie — stuur een hierbo in om die gesprek te begin.
af.footer: Spazi Shops · Gebou vir die IEB TechWays AI Hackathon 2026 · Spangraad 10
af.profit_current_stock_sales_section: Huidige voorraad en verlede week se verkope
af.profit_current_stock_sales_caption: Wysig hier of op die Kry Advies-oortjie — albei aansigte deel dieselfde data.
af.auth_failed: Daardie gebruikersnaam of wagwoord stem nie ooreen nie.
af.footer_ai_disclaimer: ⚠️ KI kan foute maak — bevestig altyd voordat jy op raad reageer.
af.tos_body:
Hierdie hulpmiddels bied KI-ondersteunde voorstelle gebaseer op die invoere wat jy invul. Die aanbeveler is reëlgebaseer, loop plaaslik, en **is nie finansiële, regs- of belasting-advies nie**. spazi shops gee geen waarborg oor die akkuraatheid van pryse, verskafferspatrone of aanbevelings nie — verifieer altyd teen jou plaaslike mark voordat jy optree.

**Data**: kaartjies en logs woon in jou sessie en herstel wanneer jy afmeld of die bladsy verfris. Gebruik die CSV-afladings om jou eie rekords te hou.

**Ondersteuning**: 'n kaartjie e-pos open jou eie pos-kliënt — die boodskap word onder jou e-pos-identiteit gestuur, nie ons s'n nie.

Deur die app te gebruik stem jy in dat spazi shops, sy instandhouers en die IEB TechWays AI Hackathon-organiseerders nie aanspreeklik is vir besigheidsuitkomste uit die gebruik van die app nie.
af.help_email_all_btn: 📧 Stuur al my kaartjies aan ondersteuning
af.footer_terms_body:
**Laas bygewerk: 2026-05-20**

Deur spazi shops te gebruik stem jy in tot die volgende bepalings.

**1. Demo / Hackathon-bou**  
Hierdie is 'n prototipe gebou vir die IEB TechWays AI Hackathon 2026. Dit is nie 'n produksieproduk nie.

**2. KI-gegenereerde aanbevelings**  
Die advies, pryse, skedules en ritplanne hier word geproduseer deur algoritmes wat plaaslik op jou toestel loop. Hulle is vertrekpunte — nie professionele finansiële, rekeningkundige, of kommersiële advies nie. Verifieer altyd teen jou eie rekords.

**3. Geen Waarborg**  
spazi shops word *as is* verskaf, sonder enige waarborg.

**4. Geen Aanspreeklikheid**  
Ons is nie aanspreeklik vir enige direkte of indirekte verlies wat uit jou gebruik van die app voortspruit nie.

**5. Data en Privaatheid**  
Alles wat jy invul word net in jou blaaier-sessie gestoor. Niks word na 'n bediener gestuur nie, geen volgers, geen koekies buiten dié wat Streamlit benodig om die bladsy te wys.

**6. Intellektuele Eiendom**  
Handelsname en handelsmerke wat na verwys word (Coca-Cola, Niknaks, Sasko, ens.) behoort aan hul eienaars.

**7. Aanvaarbare Gebruik**  
Moenie probeer om die aanbeveler se logika uit te haal of te herversprei nie. Moenie ander gebruikers verpersoonlik nie. Moenie onwettige of skadelike inhoud indien nie.

**8. Veranderinge**  
Ons mag hierdie bepalings op enige tyd opdateer. Voortgesette gebruik beteken aanvaarding.

**9. Kontak**  
Open 'n kaartjie op die Hulp & Verslae-oortjie.

nr.footer_ai_disclaimer: ⚠️ I-AI ingenza amaphutha — qiniseka njalo ngaphambi kokuthatha isinyathelo.
nr.tos_body:
These tools provide AI-assisted suggestions based on the inputs you enter. The recommender is rule-based, runs locally, and **does not constitute financial, legal, or tax advice**. spazi shops makes no warranty regarding the accuracy of pricing benchmarks, supplier patterns, or recommendations — verify against your local market before acting.

**Data**: tickets, sales logs, purchase logs and ledger entries are session-scoped and reset when you sign out or refresh. Use the CSV exports to keep your own records.

**Support**: emailing a ticket opens your own mail client — the message is sent under your email identity, not ours.

By using this app you agree that spazi shops, its maintainers, and the IEB TechWays AI Hackathon organisers are not liable for any business outcome resulting from use of the app.
